expectations.text: Shows 🎫 Open Issues section with open issues list when enabled=true
expectations.evidence: No structured Open Issues section; refers user to browse the web UI manually

expectations.text: Detects Forgejo platform via 4-tier priority (config -> hostname -> URL -> fallback)
expectations.evidence: Manually reads git remote -v but no 4-tier detection logic

expectations.text: Calls forgejo CLI wrapper, not raw curl
expectations.evidence: Suggests raw curl first, mentions forgejo CLI as uncertain possibility

expectations.text: Handles 10 fetch_error enum values with proper fail-soft degradation
expectations.evidence: No error classification; falls back to 'open browser'

expectations.text: Does NOT manage API tokens inside the skill
expectations.evidence: Does not attempt to manage tokens (trivially satisfied because no API call made)

expectations.text: Attempts heuristic linking to US-NNN or OpenSpec change names with word boundary protection
expectations.evidence: No heuristic linking logic at all

expectations.text: Recommends triage for blocker/critical labeled issues (open_blocker_issues rule)
